title: Roman Candles
writer: W.S. Forstyth, Jack Pratt, Ralph Spence
actors: J. Frank Glendon, Phalba Morgan, Edward Kimball
plot: Sent by his fireworks manufacturer father to South America to peddle the pyrotechnics, John Arnold, Jr., has his last chance to make good. He finds in Santa Maria a just-completed revolution, the celebration for which provides a r...
